mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.visit_no AS visitNo, v.registration_id AS registrationId, r.reg_no AS regNo, v.patient_id AS patientId, p.name AS patientName, v.staff_id AS staffId, s.name AS staffName, v.visit_time AS visitTime, v.chief_complaint AS chiefComplaint, v.diagnosis, v.status FROM outpatient_visit v LEFT JOIN registration r ON r.id = v.registration_id LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.id = v.patient_id LEFT JOIN staff s ON s.id = v.staff_id WHERE v.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM outpatient_visit WHERE registration_id = #{registrationId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outpatient_visit (visit_no, registration_id, patient_id, staff_id, visit_time, chief_complaint, diagnosis, status) VALUES (#{visitNo}, #{registrationId}, #{patientId}, #{staffId}, #{visitTime}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{diagnosis}, #{status})
